markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content inventory strategies and workflows for GrowthX.ai's Atlas platform.](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content inventory process involves two main components: site analysis (sitemap/subdirectories) and competitive research](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [MVP focus should be on core experience post-setup, not on creating a complex self-serve setup process](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Tagging system crucial for categorizing content and communicating content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [URL-based keyword clustering is an efficient shortcut for assignment creation and opportunity analysis](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### Current Workflow and Tools Replacement

  - [Replacing SEMrush and Airtable functionalities within Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Concerns about replicating SEMrush's data capacity in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Marcel's custom Airtable workflows are complex but manual; focus on replicating core functionalities](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### Content Inventory Process

  - [For sites with many pages: analyze sitemap, identify evergreen content and relevant subdirectories](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Monitor page performance, rankings, and enrich with LLM queries over time](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Track impact of work on client's metrics (e.g., 40 refreshes out of 1000 URLs)](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Tagging and Metadata Enrichment

  - [Create custom classifiers and taxonomies for content categorization](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Tag both assignments and pages based on research and client needs](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Examples: topic clusters, group types, personas, content themes](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Automate tagging for large volumes (e.g., 5000 items) with human review capability](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Competitive Research and Keyword Analysis

  - [Conduct keyword gap analysis between competitor domains and client's domain](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Use competitor URLs as shortcuts for keyword clustering](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Example: 1000 potential assignments totaling 5 million searches/month for Interwell](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

### Assignment Creation and Scoring

  - [Use URL-based keyword clusters to define assignment keywords](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Calculate opportunity volume and average difficulty from keyword data](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Incorporate existing scoring frameworks (e.g., lead generation value, persona fit, search intent)](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Develop an opportunity score (0-100) based on relevance, volume, and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

### Data Visualization and Insights

  - [Monitor page performance, titles, rankings, and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Provide insights on content themes, audience groups, and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Enable custom attribute addition and data shuffling for flexible analysis](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Use Engine as a primary dataset for developing the content inventory system in Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Focus on replicating core functionalities rather than creating a complex self-serve setup process](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Develop the tagging system and automated classification with human review capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Implement URL-based keyword clustering for efficient assignment creation](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Create an opportunity scoring system combining relevance, volume, and difficulty metrics](https://fathom.video/share/VbgGhPLYZ6UxtcYeUhwwxBt8erJY13u8?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
